event: Two men in white shirts at a bar or club
description: Two men stand side by side in three-quarter profile, both facing to the right. The man on the left wears glasses, a white shirt with suspenders, and holds his jacket over his shoulder. The man on the right wears a similar white shirt with a dark tie and holds a cigarette. Behind them, a dimly lit interior with grey-blue walls, a half-circle light fixture, and framed artwork is visible. A third smaller figure is partially visible below. The style is clean and graphic with a modern, slightly retro sensibility.
